'''chovafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulpecular|vulpecular]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulpecular|vulpecular]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chovafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chovafithi|chovafithi]] || [[word:chovafiji|chovafiji]] || [[word:chovafishi|chovafishi]] || [[word:chovafiki|chovafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chovafuthu|chovafuthu]] || [[word:chovafuju|chovafuju]] || [[word:chovafushu|chovafushu]] || [[word:chovafuku|chovafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chovafuthu|chovafuthu]] || [[word:chovafuju|chovafuju]] || [[word:chovafushu|chovafushu]] || [[word:chovafuku|chovafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chovafufthuf|chovafufthuf]] || [[word:chovafufjuf|chovafufjuf]] || [[word:chovafufshuf|chovafufshuf]] || [[word:chovafufkuf|chovafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chovafethe|chovafethe]] || [[word:chovafeje|chovafeje]] || [[word:chovafeshe|chovafeshe]] || [[word:chovafeke|chovafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chovafotho|chovafotho]] || [[word:chovafojo|chovafojo]] || [[word:chovafosho|chovafosho]] || [[word:chovafoko|chovafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chovafotho|chovafotho]] || [[word:chovafojo|chovafojo]] || [[word:chovafosho|chovafosho]] || [[word:chovafoko|chovafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chovafofthof|chovafofthof]] || [[word:chovafofjof|chovafofjof]] || [[word:chovafofshof|chovafofshof]] || [[word:chovafofkof|chovafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfthĂŻf|chovafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfjĂŻf|chovafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfshĂŻf|chovafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfkĂŻf|chovafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfthĂŻf|chovafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfjĂŻf|chovafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfshĂŻf|chovafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfkĂŻf|chovafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfthĂŻf|chovafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfjĂŻf|chovafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfshĂŻf|chovafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfkĂŻf|chovafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfthĂŻf|chovafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfjĂŻf|chovafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfshĂŻf|chovafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chovafĂŻfkĂŻf|chovafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chovafĂŠthĂŠ|chovafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chovafĂŠjĂŠ|chovafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chovafĂŠshĂŠ|chovafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chovafĂŠkĂŠ|chovafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chovafatha|chovafatha]] || [[word:chovafaja|chovafaja]] || [[word:chovafasha|chovafasha]] || [[word:chovafaka|chovafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chovafatha|chovafatha]] || [[word:chovafaja|chovafaja]] || [[word:chovafasha|chovafasha]] || [[word:chovafaka|chovafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chovafafthaf|chovafafthaf]] || [[word:chovafafjaf|chovafafjaf]] || [[word:chovafafshaf|chovafafshaf]] || [[word:chovafafkaf|chovafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chovafasha|chovafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chovafshĂ«asha|chovafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chovafroasha|chovafroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chovafmuasha|chovafmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chovafyaasha|chovafyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochovafnkshĂ«asha|gochovafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochovafnkroasha|gochovafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochovafnkmuasha|gochovafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochovafnkyaasha|gochovafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chovavafasha|chovavafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chovavafshĂ«asha|chovavafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chovavafroasha|chovavafroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chovavafmuasha|chovavafmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chovavafyaasha|chovavafyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochovavafnkshĂ«asha|gochovavafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochovavafnkroasha|gochovavafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochovavafnkmuasha|gochovavafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochovavafnkyaasha|gochovavafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chevĂŠfasha|chevĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chevĂŠfshĂ«asha|chevĂŠfshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chevĂŠfroasha|chevĂŠfroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chevĂŠfmuasha|chevĂŠfmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chevĂŠfyaasha|chevĂŠfyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochevĂŠfnkshĂ«asha|gochevĂŠfnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochevĂŠfnkroasha|gochevĂŠfnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochevĂŠfnkmuasha|gochevĂŠfnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochevĂŠfnkyaasha|gochevĂŠfnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chovfafasha|chovfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chovfafshĂ«asha|chovfafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chovfafroasha|chovfafroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chovfafmuasha|chovfafmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chovfafyaasha|chovfafyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochovfafnkshĂ«asha|gochovfafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochovfafnkroasha|gochovfafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochovfafnkmuasha|gochovfafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochovfafnkyaasha|gochovfafnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
